structured.name: Requirements
structured.objective:
To enable the Charging Station to continue to use the current ChargingProfile for the duration of
the transaction while it is Offline.
structured.description:
If a Charging Station goes Offline after having received a transaction-specific ChargingProfile with
purpose TxProfile, then it continues to use this profile for the duration of the transaction or until
the TxProfile reaches its expiration, depending on which occurs first.
scenario: 1. The CSMS sends a SetChargingProfileRequest to the Charging Station with a TxProfile.
2. The Charging Station responds with a SetChargingProfileResponse.

3. While charging is in progress the EVSE will continuously adapt the maximum current or power
according to the installed ChargingProfiles.
4. The Charging Station is Offline and operates stand-alone.

5. While charging is in progress the EVSE will continuously adapt the maximum current or power
according to the already installed ChargingProfiles.
structured.prerequisites:
A transaction is ongoing.
The Functional Block Smart Charging is installed.
structured.postconditions:
Successful postcondition:
The Charging Station continues to use the charging profiles which are available.
Failure postcondition:
n/a

requirements.precondition:
If the Charging Station goes Offline
after having received a transaction-
specific ChargingProfile with
purpose TxProfile.
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL continue to use this profile for the duration of
the transaction or until the TxProfile reaches its expiration, depending on
which occurs first.

requirements.precondition:
If the Charging Station goes Offline,
without having any charging profiles.
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL execute the transaction as if no constraints
apply.

chunks.content:
# K06 - Requirements

**Objective:** To enable the Charging Station to continue to use the current ChargingProfile for the duration of
the transaction while it is Offline.

**Description:** If a Charging Station goes Offline after having received a transaction-specific ChargingProfile with
purpose TxProfile, then it continues to use this profile for the duration of the transaction or until
the TxProfile reaches its expiration, depending on which occurs first.

**Actors:** Charging Station, CSMS, EV

**Scenario:**
1. The CSMS sends a SetChargingProfileRequest to the Charging Station with a TxProfile.
2. The Charging Station responds with a SetChargingProfileResponse.
3. While charging is in progress the EVSE will continuously adapt the maximum current or power
according to the installed ChargingProfiles.
4. The Charging Station is Offline and operates stand-alone.
5. While charging is in progress the EVSE will continuously adapt the maximum current or power
according to the already installed ChargingProfiles.

**Prerequisites:** A transaction is ongoing.
The Functional Block Smart Charging is installed.

**Postconditions:** Successful postcondition:
The Charging Station continues to use the charging profiles which are available.
Failure postcondition:
n/a

# K06 - Requirements

**K06.FR.01**
Precondition: If the Charging Station goes Offline
after having received a transaction-
specific ChargingProfile with
purpose TxProfile.
The Charging Station SHALL continue to use this profile for the duration of
the transaction or until the TxProfile reaches its expiration, depending on
which occurs first.

**K06.FR.02**
Precondition: If the Charging Station goes Offline,
without having any charging profiles.
The Charging Station SHALL execute the transaction as if no constraints
apply.
